title: silphium radula var. gracile
intro: Silphium radula var. gracile is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Silphium radula var. gracile include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea or using them in tincture form for medicinal purposes.
